reason: Replace the legacy salary-divided-by-30, 38%-58% clamp, 238-day maximum and grouped claim-type shortcuts with the current SARS contribution ceiling and Department of Employment and Labour 365-day two-tier benefit contract. Maternity is isolated at 66% of the capped benefit basis for at most 121 days, while the combined employer-pay top-up limit is tested against actual normal remuneration; adoption, parental and reduced-work-time are guidance-only.
